text.title: Cross-Tool Migration Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observables (work_item_count, field_parity_pct, identity_merge_complexity) to apply / fall-back / skip. Each leaf references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

conclusion.verdict: parity gap too wide — pick different target or accept manual loss
manual recreate is faster than the playbook overhead

text.example: work_item_count=1200 → field_parity_pct=85 → apply full six-phase migration (rule six-phase-mandatory).
